title: Vaada Vaa Machi Lyrics Demonte Colony
stanzas:
Vaada vaa machi
namma life eh
oru vaththi kuchi
namathuthaan pona
pathathe adha
eriya vachi (2)

thimiraga poda ponale
nee jeyikkum katchi.
dealathaan podu
nee maanja potta kaathadi

vaa da nee podu da
pala scene-a podu da.
un feel-u gaandellam
nee thoora poduda.

poda indha life-u thaan
pudhu cooling beer-u da.
speed-ah adhu pongura
norayaa paaruda.

un nenjum onnu sollum da
adha ketta nee pova munnala.    
unakedhum oru kastam na
nanben naan nippen un pinnala.

sondhamlam adhu
kuppathu koli pol
era potta vandhu koththikkum

friendship eh dhenam
unakaaga pathikkum
kai korthu ada
po po munna po

vaa da nee podu da
pala scene ah podu da
un feel-u gaandellam
thoora poduda

poda indha life-u thaan
idhu cooling beer-u da
speed-ah adhu pongura
maya paaruda

money koondil
ulla mani paarthu
ada mallandhu
nee kedakkadha.

un time-um
ippo start aagum
hey un geththa
nee ezhakadha.

avan jeipan ada ivan
kooda jeipan da.
adhanaala feel pannadha

nee jeicha avanum
annaarndhu paappaan da
dhillaaga nee
 po po munna po

Vaada vaa machi
namma life eh
oru vaththi kuchi
namathuthaan pona
pathathe adha
eriya vachi (2)

thimiraga poda ponale
nee jeyikkum katchi.
dealathaan podu
nee maanja potta kaathadi

[vaa da nee podu da
pala scene-a podu da.
un feel-u gaandellam
nee thoora poduda.

poda indha life-u thaan
pudhu cooling beer-u da.
speed-ah adhu pongura
norayaa paaruda.](2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a sense of carefree living and enjoying life to the fullest, embodying a youthful spirit.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Demonte Colony, the song reflects the characters' lively interactions and their approach to life amidst challenges.

Who is the music director of this song?

The music for Vaada Vaa Machi is composed by Anirudh, known for his catchy and energetic tracks.

When was the song released?

Vaada Vaa Machi was released on May 22, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vaada Vaa Machi, the vibrant energy of the song encapsulates the carefree spirit of youth, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations. The lively beats and catchy lyrics resonate with the characters' zest for life in Demonte Colony. This dance number evokes feelings of joy and excitement, encouraging listeners to embrace every moment. Overall, it serves as a reminder to enjoy life and have fun, no matter the circumstances.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaada Vaa Machi from Demonte Colony is an electrifying track that perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. With Anirudh's signature beats driving the energy, this song is a must-listen for anyone looking to elevate their mood. Dive into the vibrant world of this catchy number that promises to keep you on your feet!
stanzaMeanings: Come on, buddy, our life is like a messy situation, we just have to deal with it.
Go away, if you go, you will win the competition. Just put in the effort, and you'll succeed.
Come on, show your skills, put on a good show. Don't hold back your feelings.
This life is like a refreshing beer. Just look at the speed with which it goes by.
Your heart will tell you something, if you listen, you will understand. If you have a problem, I will be behind you.
Friendship is like a chicken that lays eggs, it will come and surprise you.
I will work hard for our friendship, so just go ahead and leave.
Come on, show your skills, put on a good show. Don't hold back your feelings.
This life is like a refreshing beer. Just look at the speed with which it goes by.
Don't look at the money, just focus on what you want to achieve.
Your time will start now, hey, don't hesitate.
He will win, and he will win with him. So don't feel bad about it.
If you win, he will also be happy, so just go ahead and leave.
Come on, buddy, our life is like a messy situation, we just have to deal with it.
Go away, if you go, you will win the competition. Just put in the effort, and you'll succeed.
